steps.title: Find the purpose signal in the notes
steps.content: The notes state “It helps improve conditions for workers in that nation” when describing the MTUC — this directly reveals what national union federations do.

steps.title: Apply the purpose to identify the correct choice
steps.content: Choice C states that national union federations work to improve conditions for workers in their member nations, using the MTUC example to explain the broader purpose. The other choices focus on federation structure and identification rather than explaining purpose. That matches choice C — C is correct.
